passage_title: A new role for livestock guard dogs

sentences.sentence: For thousands of years, livestock guard dogs worked alongside shepherds to protect their sheep, goats and cattle from predators such as wolves and bears.
sentences.translation: 数千年来，牲畜护卫犬一直与牧羊人并肩工作，保护绵羊、山羊和牛免受狼和熊等捕食者侵害。

structure.text: to protect their sheep, goats and cattle from predators such as wolves and bears

difficult_points: to protect 表示与牧羊人合作的目的；from 引出保护对象。
such as 后列举捕食者例子。

sentences.sentence: But in the 19th and 20th centuries, when such predators were largely exterminated, most guard dogs lost their jobs.
sentences.translation: 但在19和20世纪，这些捕食者大多被消灭后，大多数护卫犬失去了工作。

structure.text: when such predators were largely exterminated

difficult_points: when 从句使用被动语态，说明捕食者被消灭。
lost their jobs 是拟人化表达，指护卫需求下降。

sentences.sentence: In recent years, however, as increased efforts have been made to protect wild animals, predators have become more widespread again.
sentences.translation: 然而近年来，随着保护野生动物的努力增加，捕食者又变得更加普遍。

structure.text: as increased efforts have been made to protect wild animals

difficult_points: as 表示随着；have been made 是现在完成时被动。
to protect wild animals 说明 efforts 的目的。

sentences.sentence: As a result, farmers once more need to protect their livestock, and guard dogs are enjoying an unexpected revival.
sentences.translation: 因此，农民再次需要保护牲畜，护卫犬也迎来了意外复兴。

structure.text: farmers once more need to protect their livestock
and guard dogs are enjoying an unexpected revival

difficult_points: and 连接需求变化和护卫犬复兴两个结果。
need to protect 表示再次出现的必要性。

sentences.sentence: Today there are around 50 breeds of guard dogs on duty in various parts of the world.
sentences.translation: 如今，世界各地约有50个品种的护卫犬在执行任务。

structure.text: around 50 breeds of guard dogs on duty in various parts of the world

difficult_points: there are 结构的真正主语是 50 breeds。
on duty 表示正在执行护卫任务。

sentences.sentence: These dogs are raised from an early age with the animals they will be watching and eventually these animals become the dog’s family.
sentences.translation: 这些狗从小就和将来要看护的动物一起饲养，最终这些动物会成为狗的家人。

structure.text: are raised from an early age with the animals they will be watching
eventually these animals become the dog’s family

difficult_points: they will be watching 修饰 animals，watching 后省略关系代词。
become the dog’s family 表示建立社会依附关系。

sentences.sentence: The dogs will place themselves between the livestock and any threat, barking loudly.
sentences.translation: 狗会站在牲畜和任何威胁之间，并大声吠叫。

structure.text: will place themselves between the livestock and any threat

difficult_points: place themselves between 表示主动挡在中间。
barking 是伴随分词，说明同时发出的警告。

sentences.sentence: If necessary, they will chase away predators, but often their mere presence is sufficient.
sentences.translation: 必要时，它们会赶走捕食者，但通常仅仅出现就足够了。

structure.text: but often their mere presence is sufficient

difficult_points: If necessary 省略了 it is；mere presence 强调无需攻击。
chase away 表示驱赶。

sentences.sentence: 'Their initial training is to make them understand that livestock is going to be their life,' says Dan Macon, a shepherd with three guard dogs.
sentences.translation: “它们最初的训练是让它们明白，牲畜将是它们一生的伙伴。”拥有三只护卫犬的牧羊人Dan Macon说。

structure.text: that livestock is going to be their life
a shepherd with three guard dogs

difficult_points: make them understand 是使役结构；that 从句是 understand 的宾语。
be going to be their life 是把牲畜视为终身生活环境的表达。

sentences.sentence: 'A fluffy white puppy is fun to be around, but too much human affection makes it a great dog for guarding the front porch, rather than a great livestock guard dog.'
sentences.translation: “毛茸茸的白色小狗很讨人喜欢，但过多的人类宠爱会让它适合看守门廊，而不是成为优秀的牲畜护卫犬。”

structure.text: A fluffy white puppy is fun to be around
but too much human affection makes it a great dog for guarding the front porch, rather than a great livestock guard dog

difficult_points: be fun to be around 表示相处愉快；make + 宾语 + 补语表示宠爱造成的结果。
rather than 对比门廊看守与牲畜护卫。

sentences.sentence: The evidence indicates that guard dogs are highly effective.
sentences.translation: 证据表明护卫犬非常有效。

structure.text: that guard dogs are highly effective

difficult_points: indicate 后接 that 宾语从句。
highly 修饰 effective，强调效果程度。

sentences.sentence: For example, in Portugal, biologist Silvia Ribeiro has found that more than 90 per cent of the farmers participating in a programme to train and use guard dogs to protect their herds against attack from wolves rate the performance of the dogs as very good or excellent.
sentences.translation: 例如，葡萄牙生物学家Silvia Ribeiro发现，参与护卫犬训练和使用项目、保护畜群免受狼袭的农民中，超过90%认为狗的表现非常好或优秀。

structure.text: that more than 90 per cent of the farmers participating in a programme to train and use guard dogs to protect their herds against attack from wolves rate the performance of the dogs as very good or excellent
participating in a programme to train and use guard dogs
to protect their herds against attack from wolves

difficult_points: 主句嵌套多个 to 不定式，说明项目和保护目的。
rate A as B 表示把狗的表现评价为B。

sentences.sentence: In a study carried out in Australia by Linda van Bommel and Chris Johnson at the University of Tasmania, more than 65 per cent of herders reported that predation stopped completely after they got the dogs, and almost all the rest saw a decrease in attacks.
sentences.translation: 在塔斯马尼亚大学Linda van Bommel和Chris Johnson于澳大利亚开展的一项研究中，超过65%的牧民报告说得到护卫犬后捕食完全停止，几乎所有其余牧民都看到袭击减少。

structure.text: In a study carried out in Australia by Linda van Bommel and Chris Johnson at the University of Tasmania
more than 65 per cent of herders reported
that predation stopped completely after they got the dogs
and almost all the rest saw a decrease in attacks

difficult_points: carried out 修饰 study；that 从句说明牧民报告内容。
the rest 指其余牧民，and 连接两种结果。

sentences.sentence: 'If they are managed and used properly, livestock guard dogs are the most efficient control method that we have in terms of the amount of livestock that they save from predation,' says van Bommel.
sentences.translation: “如果管理和使用得当，按保护牲畜免受捕食的数量计算，护卫犬是我们拥有的最高效控制方法。”van Bommel说。

structure.text: If they are managed and used properly
livestock guard dogs are the most efficient control method that we have
in terms of the amount of livestock that they save from predation

difficult_points: are managed and used 是并列被动；that 修饰 method 和 livestock。
in terms of 限定效率衡量标准。

sentences.sentence: But today’s guard dogs also have a new role – to help preserve the predators.
sentences.translation: 但如今护卫犬还有一个新作用——帮助保护捕食者。
difficult_points: to help preserve 是 role 的同位说明。
preserve predators 与传统保护牲畜形成反向目标。

sentences.sentence: It is hoped that reductions in livestock losses can make farmers more tolerant of predators and less likely to kill them.
sentences.translation: 人们希望牲畜损失减少能让农民更容忍捕食者，也不那么可能杀死它们。

structure.text: that reductions in livestock losses can make farmers more tolerant of predators and less likely to kill them
farmers more tolerant of predators and less likely to kill them

difficult_points: It is hoped 是无人称被动，that 从句是真正内容。
make + 宾语 + 形容词/短语补语并列。

sentences.sentence: In Namibia, more than 90 per cent of cheetahs live outside protected areas, close to humans raising livestock.
sentences.translation: 在纳米比亚，超过90%的猎豹生活在保护区外，靠近养牲畜的人类。

structure.text: more than 90 per cent of cheetahs

difficult_points: raising livestock 修饰 humans；close to 说明空间关系。
outside protected areas 与 close to humans 构成风险背景。

sentences.sentence: As a result, the cheetahs are often held responsible for animal losses, and large numbers have been killed by farmers.
sentences.translation: 因此，猎豹常被认为要对牲畜损失负责，大量猎豹被农民杀死。

structure.text: the cheetahs are often held responsible for animal losses
and large numbers have been killed by farmers

difficult_points: be held responsible for 是被动归责表达。
and 后 have been killed 是现在完成时被动。

sentences.sentence: When guard dogs were introduced, more than 90 per cent of farmers reported a dramatic reduction in livestock losses, and said that as a result they were less likely to kill predators.
sentences.translation: 引入护卫犬后，超过90%的农民报告牲畜损失大幅减少，并表示因此不太可能杀死捕食者。

structure.text: more than 90 per cent of farmers reported a dramatic reduction in livestock losses
and said that as a result they were less likely to kill predators
that as a result they were less likely to kill predators

difficult_points: were introduced 是被动；reported 与 said 并列。
that 从句中的 they 指 farmers，as a result 表示因果。

sentences.sentence: Julie Young, at Utah State University in the US, believes this result applies widely.
sentences.translation: 美国犹他州立大学的Julie Young认为这一结果具有广泛适用性。

structure.text: at Utah State University in the US

difficult_points: 地点短语是插入信息；believes 后接省略 that 的从句。
applies widely 表示结果可推广。

sentences.sentence: 'There is common ground from the livestock perspective and from the conservation perspective,' she says.
sentences.translation: “从牲畜和保护角度看，双方有共同立场。”她说。

structure.text: There is common ground from the livestock perspective and from the conservation perspective

difficult_points: There is 的主语是 common ground；两个 from 短语说明共同立场的双方。
common ground 是共同点的固定表达。

sentences.sentence: 'If ranchers don’t have a dead cow, they will not make a call to apply for a permit to kill a wolf.'
sentences.translation: “如果牧场主没有死牛，他们就不会打电话申请杀狼许可。”

structure.text: If ranchers don’t have a dead cow
they will not make a call to apply for a permit to kill a wolf
to apply for a permit to kill a wolf

difficult_points: If + 一般现在时搭配 will，表示现实可能条件。
to apply 与 to kill 两层目的不定式。

sentences.sentence: Looking at all the published evidence, Bethany Smith at Nottingham Trent University in the UK found that up to 88 per cent of farmers said they no longer killed predators after using dogs – but warned that such self-reported results must be taken with a pinch of salt.
sentences.translation: 考察所有已发表证据后，英国诺丁汉特伦特大学的Bethany Smith发现，最多88%的农民说使用护卫犬后不再杀死捕食者，但她警告这类自我报告结果必须谨慎看待。

structure.text: Looking at all the published evidence
Bethany Smith at Nottingham Trent University in the UK found
that up to 88 per cent of farmers said they no longer killed predators after using dogs
but warned that such self-reported results must be taken with a pinch of salt
that such self-reported results must be taken with a pinch of salt

difficult_points: Looking at 分词说明研究方法；found 与 warned 并列。
take with a pinch of salt 是“持保留态度看待”的习语。

expressions.text: take with a pinch of salt

sentences.sentence: What's more, it is possible that livestock guard dogs merely displace predators to unprotected neighbouring properties, where their fate isn’t recorded.
sentences.translation: 此外，护卫犬可能只是把捕食者赶到没有保护的邻近地产，而那里捕食者的命运不会被记录。

structure.text: that livestock guard dogs merely displace predators to unprotected neighbouring properties

difficult_points: it is possible that 是可能性结构；where 修饰 properties。
displace 表示驱移而非消灭，暗示统计遗漏。

sentences.sentence: 'In some regions, we work with almost every farmer, but in others only one or two have dogs,' says Ribeiro.
sentences.translation: “在一些地区，我们几乎与每位农民合作，但在另一些地区只有一两个农民养护卫犬。”Ribeiro说。

structure.text: In some regions, we work with almost every farmer
but in others only one or two have dogs

difficult_points: but 对比两个地区的覆盖程度；one or two 指农民。
work with 表示合作而非雇佣。

sentences.sentence: 'If we are not working with everybody, we are transferring the wolf pressure to the neighbour’s herd and he can use poison and kill an entire pack of wolves.'
sentences.translation: “如果我们没有和所有人合作，就会把狼的压力转移到邻居的畜群上，而邻居可能用毒药杀死整群狼。”

structure.text: If we are not working with everybody
we are transferring the wolf pressure to the neighbour’s herd
and he can use poison and kill an entire pack of wolves

difficult_points: 现在进行时表示正在造成的转移；and 后 he 指邻居。
use poison 与 kill 并列，说明潜在严重后果。

sentences.sentence: Another concern is whether there may be unintended ecological effects of using guard dogs.
sentences.translation: 另一个担忧是使用护卫犬是否会产生意想不到的生态影响。

structure.text: whether there may be unintended ecological effects of using guard dogs

difficult_points: whether 从句作表语，提出担忧内容。
of using guard dogs 修饰 effects。

sentences.sentence: Studies suggest that reducing deaths of one type of predator may have a negative impact on other species.
sentences.translation: 研究表明，减少一种捕食者的死亡可能会对其他物种产生负面影响。

structure.text: that reducing deaths of one type of predator may have a negative impact on other species
reducing deaths of one type of predator

difficult_points: 动名词短语作 that 从句主语；may 表示可能性。
impact on 表示影响对象。

sentences.sentence: The extent of this problem isn’t known, but the consequences are clear in Namibia.
sentences.translation: 这个问题的程度尚不清楚，但在纳米比亚，后果很明显。

structure.text: but the consequences are clear in Namibia

difficult_points: isn't known 是被动，extent 指影响范围。
but 对比未知程度和已观察后果。

sentences.sentence: Cheetahs aren’t the only species that cause sheep and goat losses there: other predators also attack livestock.
sentences.translation: 猎豹并不是那里造成绵羊和山羊损失的唯一物种：其他捕食者也会攻击牲畜。

structure.text: Cheetahs aren’t the only species that cause sheep and goat losses there
that cause sheep and goat losses there

difficult_points: that 修饰 species；not the only 表示还有其他物种。
冒号后直接补充其他捕食者的作用。

sentences.sentence: In 2015, researchers reported that in spite of the impact farmers obtaining guard dogs had on cheetahs, the number of jackals killed by dogs and people actually increased.
sentences.translation: 2015年，研究人员报告称，尽管获得护卫犬的农民影响了猎豹，被狗和人杀死的豺数量实际上增加了。

structure.text: that in spite of the impact farmers obtaining guard dogs had on cheetahs, the number of jackals killed by dogs and people actually increased
farmers obtaining guard dogs had on cheetahs

difficult_points: in spite of 引出让步背景；farmers...had 是省略关系代词的定语结构。
killed by dogs and people 修饰 jackals，说明死亡原因。

sentences.sentence: Guard dogs have other ecological impacts too.
sentences.translation: 护卫犬也有其他生态影响。
difficult_points: too 放在句末表示“也”。
other 指除前文影响之外的影响。

sentences.sentence: They have been found to spread diseases to wild animals, including endangered Ethiopian wolves.
sentences.translation: 人们发现它们会把疾病传播给野生动物，包括濒危的埃塞俄比亚狼。

structure.text: to spread diseases to wild animals

difficult_points: have been found to do 是被动发现结构。
including 列举受影响的濒危物种。

sentences.sentence: They may also compete with other carnivores for food.
sentences.translation: 它们还可能与其他食肉动物争夺食物。
difficult_points: may 表示生态影响的可能性；compete with 与 for 分别表示竞争对象和资源。
other carnivores 指其他食肉动物，for food 说明竞争资源。

sentences.sentence: And by creating a 'landscape of fear', their mere presence can influence the behaviour of prey animals.
sentences.translation: 而且，通过制造“恐惧景观”，它们仅仅存在就可能影响猎物动物的行为。
difficult_points: by creating 表示影响行为的方式；mere presence 强调无需直接攻击。
landscape of fear 是生态学比喻。

sentences.sentence: The evidence so far, however, indicates that these consequences aren’t always negative.
sentences.translation: 然而，迄今证据表明，这些后果并不总是负面的。

structure.text: that these consequences aren’t always negative

difficult_points: so far 修饰 evidence，表示截至目前。
not always 否定绝对化判断。

sentences.sentence: Guard dogs can deliver unexpected benefits by protecting vulnerable wildlife from predators.
sentences.translation: 护卫犬通过保护脆弱野生动物免受捕食者侵害，能够带来意外益处。

structure.text: by protecting vulnerable wildlife from predators

difficult_points: by protecting 说明带来益处的方式；protect...from 表示保护对象。
can deliver benefits 表示能够产生正面生态结果。

sentences.sentence: For example, their presence has been found to protect birds which build their nests on the ground in fields, where foxes would normally raid them.
sentences.translation: 例如，人们发现护卫犬的存在能保护在田野地面筑巢的鸟类，而狐狸通常会在那里袭击鸟巢。

structure.text: their presence has been found to protect birds
which build their nests on the ground in fields
where foxes would normally raid them

difficult_points: has been found to protect 是被动发现；which 修饰 birds。
where 修饰 fields，them 指 nests。

sentences.sentence: Indeed, Australian researchers are now using dogs to enhance biodiversity and create refuges for species threatened by predation.
sentences.translation: 事实上，澳大利亚研究人员正利用狗来增强生物多样性，为受捕食威胁的物种创造避难所。

structure.text: to enhance biodiversity and create refuges for species threatened by predation

difficult_points: to enhance 与 create 并列表示使用狗的目的。
threatened by predation 修饰 species。

sentences.sentence: So if we can get this right, there may be a bright future for guard dogs in promoting harmonious coexistence between humans and wildlife.
sentences.translation: 因此，如果我们能正确处理这件事，护卫犬或许会在促进人类与野生动物和谐共存方面拥有光明未来。

structure.text: if we can get this right
there may be a bright future for guard dogs
in promoting harmonious coexistence between humans and wildlife

difficult_points: get this right 指正确管理护卫犬的生态影响；there may be 表示可能性。
in promoting 修饰 future，说明未来作用。
